problem_statement: Mariano Neme's testimonial (key testimonials.6) was added in issue #18 but has two defects: (1) photo is undefined — real Firebase Storage URL is now available; (2) testimonial text is dummy/generated — must be replaced with the real text provided by Mariano Neme.
solution_strategy: Data-only fix: update photo field in Testimonials.astro and replace dummy text in all three i18n files (es.ts, en.ts, zh.ts) with real/translated content.

files_to_change.purpose: Replace `photo: undefined` with real Firebase Storage photo URL for Mariano Neme (testimonial 6, initials MN)

Replace dummy Spanish text with real verbatim testimonial: 'Groso total @julian_kusi , yo fui este año a Aconcagua y gran parte de la info de calidad la adquirí viendo el contenido en todas sus plataformas'

Replace dummy English text with faithful translation: 'Total legend @julian_kusi — I went to Aconcagua this year and most of the quality information I got was from watching the content on all your platforms'
Replace dummy Chinese text with faithful translation: '@julian_kusi 真的太棒了，我今年去了阿空加瓜，大部分高质量的信息都是通过观看您在各个平台上的内容获得的'

exact_values.text_es: Groso total @julian_kusi , yo fui este año a Aconcagua y gran parte de la info de calidad la adquirí viendo el contenido en todas sus plataformas
exact_values.text_en: Total legend @julian_kusi — I went to Aconcagua this year and most of the quality information I got was from watching the content on all your platforms
exact_values.text_zh: @julian_kusi 真的太棒了，我今年去了阿空加瓜，大部分高质量的信息都是通过观看您在各个平台上的内容获得的

manual_verification: Open http://localhost:4321 → scroll to #testimonios → navigate to slide 5 → verify photo and real text in Spanish
Open http://localhost:4321/en → verify English translation on slide 5
Open http://localhost:4321/zh → verify Chinese translation on slide 5
acceptance_criteria: photo field for testimonial 6 set to real Firebase Storage URL
testimonials.6.text in es.ts is the real verbatim testimonial
testimonials.6.text in en.ts is a faithful English translation
testimonials.6.text in zh.ts is a faithful Chinese translation
assumptions: Firebase Storage URL is publicly accessible (no auth required for read)
The testimonial text provided is the complete, final text from Mariano Neme
summitDate remains undefined (not provided in issue)
